gloss:
Statement of record: `Eidometry.Thesis.causal_rung1_width` (Eidometry thesis, section Experiments).

The interventional-query spread across all models that share the reference model's full observational reads is exactly 1/4, proved by matching upper and lower bounds. Together with its neighbors 1/2 and 0, it fixes the ladder's objective values as proved spreads rather than chosen numbers.

Discharged by [MTH.R-2026-1199].

statement.pretty: WMSpec.Transform.fiberWidth (fun M => WMSpec.Transform.IVModel.ivQuery M) {M | ∀ (z x y : Bool), WMSpec.Transform.IVModel.zxyRead M z x y = WMSpec.Transform.IVModel.zxyRead WMSpec.Transform.Mstar z x y} = ENNReal.ofReal (1 / 4)

title: Eidometry.Thesis.causal_rung1_width
